title: Duyurular
content:
Duyurular

Duyurular

Doktora Yeterlik Sınav Başvuruları / PhD Proficiency Exam Application

07
						Nisan

2026

Değerli Öğrencilerimiz,

İletişim Bilgileri:

E-posta:

enstitusekreterligi@okan.edu.tr

Telefon: 0 212 212 65 26 (1318 / 1325)

Bilgilerinize sunarız.

Dear Students,

Applications for the May 2026 PhD Qualifying Examination
have started. The examinations will be held in person.

Students who wish to take the qualifying exam must have
successfully completed all their courses and submitted all required documents.
It is important that students have their files checked by the Student Affairs
Office before applying.

Applications must be submitted by

at the latest, with a petition addressed to the Graduate School Directorate.
Petitions must be delivered to the Institute Secretariat.

Contact Information:

E-mail:

enstitusekreterligi@okan.edu.tr

For your information.
